content:
A powerful data visualization template that animates your charts, graphs, and KPIs into engaging video content.
Features # Animated bar, line, and pie charts Counter animations CSV/JSON data input support Dark and light themes
summary: Animated charts and data visualization — turn your numbers into compelling visual stories.
title: Data Visualization

content:
Build anticipation with a sleek animated countdown template. Perfect for embedding in live streams or sharing on social media ahead of launches.
Features # Real-time countdown (days, hours, minutes, seconds) Custom event name and branding Multiple style variants Loop-ready for live stream overlays
summary: Animated countdown timer for product launches, events, and live streams.
title: Event Countdown

content:
Make your message land with impact using this kinetic text animation template. Built with Remotion’s spring physics for natural, fluid motion.
Features # Spring-based text animations Multiple font presets Customizable color palette 5s / 10s / 15s variants
summary: Bold kinetic typography intro with spring animations and customizable color schemes.
title: Kinetic Text Intro

content:
Convert your podcast audio into scroll-stopping social clips with animated waveforms and auto-synced captions.
Features # Waveform animation synced to audio Auto-caption overlay Speaker name and avatar support 1:1 and 9:16 formats
summary: Auto-caption podcast clip with waveform animation — ideal for audiogram-style social posts.
title: Podcast Clip

content:
A premium product showcase template that makes your products shine with cinematic transitions and professional motion design.
Features # 16:9 aspect ratio (1920×1080) 3D-style product reveal animation Customizable background and accent colors 30s / 60s variants
summary: Cinematic product reveal video with 3D-style animations for e-commerce and launches.
title: Product Showcase

content:
A professional social story template built with Remotion, featuring smooth transitions, animated text overlays, and customizable brand colors.
Features # 9:16 aspect ratio (1080×1920) Animated text overlays Customizable colors and fonts 15s / 30s variants
summary: Animated social media story template with smooth transitions and dynamic text overlays.
title: Social Story
